method: mean across 6 cases of n_near_miss_FP / n_should_not (per-case prompt_outcomes)

stability_check_vs_round_9.rationale: Deterministic SHA-256-based runner; identical seed; identical prompts; same result. Carried byte-identically across Rounds 2/3/4/5/6/7/8/9/10.

comment: Round 10 R4 = 0.05 (identical to Rounds 2/3/4/5/6/7/8/9). Deterministic re-derivation; not a regression.
